message:
feat(api,supply_chain): live operator config from RuntimeConfig, artifact-hash provenance, root_pointer refactor

Operator config (operator_routes.rs, service.rs):
- Replace hardcoded ConfigView in get_config() with a live snapshot
  derived from RuntimeConfig via ConfigView::from_runtime_config()
- Add static lazy-lock OPERATOR_CONFIG_VIEW storage with AtomicBool
  init guard and poison-tolerant RwLock access
- Wire init_operator_config() into ControlPlaneService::new() via
  new runtime_config field on ServiceConfig
- Two new tests: default snapshot without bootstrap, and service
  bootstrap updating the operator config to legacy-risky profile

Provenance artifact hashes (trust_card.rs, trust_card_routes.rs, main.rs):
- Add artifact_hashes: Vec<String> field to ProvenanceSummary
- quarantine_trust_cards() now filters by matching artifact_hashes
  against target artifact before collecting extension IDs, preventing
  unrelated extensions from being quarantined
- Test fixture updated with placeholder sha256 hash

Root pointer refactor (root_pointer.rs):
- Extract read_root_bytes() helper to eliminate duplicated fs::read +
  error-mapping logic
- Reuse in publish_root_internal() instead of raw fs::read
- New test: read_root_missing_returns_missing_root_error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -242,10 +242,11 @@ mod tests {
             },
             revocation_status: RevocationStatus::Active,
             provenance_summary: crate::supply_chain::trust_card::ProvenanceSummary {
-                attestation_level: "slsa-l2".to_string(),
-                source_uri: "registry://test".to_string(),
-                verified_at: "2026-02-20T00:00:00Z".to_string(),
-            },
+                            attestation_level: "slsa-l1".to_string(),
+                            source_uri: "registry://demo/ext-1".to_string(),
+                            artifact_hashes: vec!["sha256:".to_string() + &"f".repeat(64)],
+                            verified_at: "2026-01-01T00:00:00Z".to_string(),
+                        },
             reputation_score_basis_points: 700,
             reputation_trend: ReputationTrend::Stable,
             active_quarantine: false,
